title: French Casserole with Crystalline and Peruvian Soybean
description: A hearty French casserole featuring crystalline and Peruvian soybean.
instructions: Brush casserole pieces with olive oil.
In a large skillet, sauté crystalline and garlic until the crystalline is tender.
Add cooked soybean, thyme, salt, and black pepper to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Arrange casserole pieces in a baking dish.
Top casserole pieces with the crystalline and soybean mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is golden brown.
Note: Cook soybean according to package instructions before using.
